top.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
top.summary: Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.

topIndia.title: How Zoho Labs pivoted to inference engineering
topIndia.summary: At DevSparks 2026 in Bengaluru, Ramprakash Ramamoorthy, Director of AI Research at Zoho Corp, explained how open-weight models forced a rethink of what an in-house AI lab is actually for, and why inference engineering became Zoho Labs' answer.

weekly.intro: 101 AI items this week (72 India-relevant) across 9 sources.

items.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
items.summary: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.

items.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
items.summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.

items.title: Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation
items.summary: The funding round would value the company at around €20 billion (about $23.15 billion), nearly double its Series C valuation of €11.7 billion.

items.title: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop

Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
items.summary: Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and other platforms to identify AI music.

items.title: How an Agent Built a 3D Paris Gallery by Chaining Two Hugging Face Spaces

items.summary: 73 packages run self-replicating stealer as soon as they're opened by an AI agent.

items.title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
items.summary: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.

items.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
items.summary: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

items.title: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know
items.summary: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registrati…

items.title: Meta’s months-old AI unit is a soul-crushing gulag, say the engineers stuck inside it
items.summary: A new report suggests the unit, which employs 6,500 people, is on the verge of revolt.

items.title: How Zoho Labs pivoted to inference engineering

items.title: KPMG retracts agentic AI study after researchers flag hallucinations, fake citations
Why Jayant Chaudhary sees AI as India's open door, not its threat
items.summary: When India recently hosted the world for a landmark AI summit, the headline was not profit or processing power. It was possibility.

items.title: Magicpin scales AI assistant Vera, targets over 10 lakh merchants by 2026: CEO
items.summary: Launched during the recent LPG crisis, Vera provides restaurants and retailers with real-time order-volume insights to help them plan operations and manage demand more effectively.

items.title: US state attorneys general are investigating OpenAI
Google says Chinese cybercrime group used its AI in scams
Nvidia begins Vera CPU sales pitch to Chinese clients, sources say
items.summary: The outreach underscores how the world's most valuable company is quickly pivoting to the new product to revive its rapidly declining fortunes in China, as shipments of its second-most powerful AI chip, the H200, to the country have stalled for months.

items.title: Mag 7? MANGOS? SpaceX forces name rethink on Wall Street's tech-stock moniker
items.summary: The IPO, the biggest in US history, vaulted SpaceX's value above two Mag 7 members: CEO Elon ‌Musk's other company, Tesla , ⁠and ⁠Meta Platforms. With trillion-dollar contenders such as OpenAI and Anthropic waiting in the IPO wings, the club may soon need a name change, analys…
